channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Big couch dropped on corner of Well Street and St Thomas place, 26th May
item.description:
This has been here for at least a week
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lyme Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Recurring issue with fly-tipping, 26th May
item.description:
The railway bridge is used as a dumping ground. This is a recurring problem. This time as well, another pile has started to form on the same pavement further up Brooke Road before the junction with Rectory Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brooke Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped here, 26th May
item.description:
A mattress has been dumped here and is blocking both the footpath and cycle lane, can council attend and remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Common, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and rubbish all over the street, 26th May
item.description:
Litter and trash left all over the street of Somerford grove and bin bags not collected
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Somerford Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken water pipe and widening tarmac cracks, 26th May
item.description:
Ouzsude 11 Manor Road since Monday, 26 May, a pothole has opened and is widening (today, Tue 27 May 2 potholes), laying bare some cables and filled wirh leakage water

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manor Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 6 cavendish road, 26th May
item.description:
Someone has dumped empty buckets

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cavendish Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Wheelie bin full of rubbish dumped on pavement, 26th May
item.description:
The contents of the bin are causing a health hazard and needs removing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street not cleaned, 26th May
item.description:
Street cleaners needed every week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ruston Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Box fallen over and covering pavement by light no 9 goring rd, 26th May
item.description:
Grey telecoms box fallen over and not leaving room on pavement to pass. Near junction with Brownlow Rd so prams / wheelchairs have to walk in road which is dangerous at junction

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brownlow Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Barriers, equipment or materials left on the highway

item.title: Double yellow lines required by traffic lsland, 26th May
item.description:
Claridon van drivers park their vehicles up very close to the traffic lsland, sometimes making it impossible to manoeuvre on the correct side of the road because they do not leave enough space to drive in between their vans and the traffic lsland. Double yellow lines are needed to stop them parking on top of the traffic island.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hawthorn Grove, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Job marked fixed but NOT, 26th May
item.description:
Job 9495866 marked fixed but no action taken Metal wire and wood structure and household items dumped on pavement/road. Been there since Tuesday 19th May

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Osbaldeston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown grass, 26th May
item.description:
This area needs to be cut due to the overgrown grass seeds which are a health hazard to dogs, foxes etc these can get stuck in their ears and paws which causes pain and stress to the animal. Thank you jayne
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fairwater Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped fridge, 26th May
item.description:
Fridge dumped a week ago since been damaged on pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brookdene Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip old toys, 26th May
item.description:
Flytip old toys sholden gardens / Roberts close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 223, High Street, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 Rubbish Bins Overfilled, 26th May
item.description:
3 bins are over flowing near the bus stop spilling onto pavement and blowing around

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 94, Wickham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter over pavement and road, 26th May
item.description:
Needs clearing up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worsley Bridge Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All of the traffic lights are broken, 26th May
item.description:
All traffic lights at this junction are broken nothing is working and people are just driving out without looking and there are other Driving at speed. It could potentially cause an accident.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rom Valley Way, Rush Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 26th May
item.description:
Please can this rubbish be picked up tonight on the bin collection

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lee Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip of bulk rubbish adjacent to 1-12 Nightingale Corner along the pathway near 84-88 Wotten Green, 26th May
item.description:
Please attend to remove the dumped rubbish adjacent to 1-12 Nightingale Corner along the pathway near 84-88 Wotten Green. This is on LBB land. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-12, Wotton Green, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping at tree, 26th May
item.description:
Fly tipping at base of tree on Powerscroft Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lower Clapton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
